phase_1_database_restore.notes: PostgreSQL cluster restore from full backup. Data volume 178.4 GB. Restore throughput approximately 1.2 GB/min.

phase_2_application_config.notes: Application configuration, secrets, and environment variable restoration from Vault backup.

phase_3_data_integrity.notes: SHA-256 checksum verification across all restored tables. Row count validation. Referential integrity checks.

phase_4_health_checks.notes: Application endpoint health checks, API response validation, background job processing confirmation.

issues_encountered.issue: Database restore throughput lower than Q3 due to increased index count
issues_encountered.resolution: No intervention required -- completed within window
issues_encountered.impact: Database restore phase 14 minutes longer than Q3

recommendations: Monitor data growth trajectory and assess RTO sustainability
Consider parallel restore for large tables to improve throughput

sign_off.comments: Test passed. All data integrity checks confirmed. RTO met.
